description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the jonzelner/rstan:latest Docker image. Define a pages job that runs in the default stage, executes the shell commands `make pdf`, `mkdir public`, and `cp output/results.pdf public/results.pdf`. The job should collect the `public` and `output` directories as artifacts and deploy them as a GitLab Pages site. No additional services, caches, variables, or rules are required.
